name: Mel's Huachinango Tikin Xic
recipeInstructions: If you don't have achiote paste, substitute 1 T annato seed, ground. If you don't have Seville orange juice, substitute 2 T orange juice and 2 T cider vinegar. Combine all ingredients except fish and olive oil in a blender. Blend completely to a paste. Smear the paste onto the fleshy side of the snapper. Allow to marinate overnight. Heat up a charcoal grill. When ready, coat each piece of snapper in olive oil. Then cook approximately 7-10 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
